query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A radial pattern of concentric circles spiraling outward from a central point, composed of streaks of green, pink, orange, yellow, and white that blend into one another, creating a vortex-like form that resembles blurred foliage or flowers in motion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A radial pattern of concentric circles spiraling outward from a central point, composed of streaks of green, pink, orange, yellow, and white that blend into one another through heavy intentional motion blur, creating a vortex-like abstract form where any recognizable subject dissolves into swirling color, the clashing warm and cool hues generating visual tension without representational clarity.
